sources.name: Switching Costs
sources.rationale: high segment concentration at 75.0% (significant platform stickiness)

sources.name: Intangible Assets
sources.rationale: R&D spending in line with industry; R&D spending growing at 41% YoY (heavy innovation investment); large revenue base (98B) enables sustained IP investment

sources.name: Network Effect
sources.rationale: no clear network-effect indicators in available data

analysis: Switching Costs and Intangible Assets and Cost Advantage create a durable competitive fortress. The company's moat is reinforced by multiple reinforcing factors, making it unlikely competitors can erode its position in the next decade.
